raw_text: everything is very nice... the service is too good and pretty fast .. the delivery man behaves well.... prices are okay.... but many items are not available in smaller quantities like everything is like 1kg 1L like that... smaller quantities aren't available....rest is good

My order was marked as delivered, but I have not received the items. The delivery partner confirmed on call that he took the items back to the store and did not deliver them. Despite this, the app shows delivered. Customer support only offered feedback and no refund/resolution. This is not a service feedback issue; this is payment taken for goods not delivered. Please either deliver my order or process a full refund. Kindly escalate this complaint and provide a complaint/ticket ID.

The best grocery and another things delivering I have seen ever blanket is the app which has the excess of most of the location I live in urban area in a rural place they are also blink it is available in 9 to 8 minutes that's pretty cool I am suggesting you don't do any app like instrumental ringtone only believe in blink it I have ordered 100 to 150 things from blinkit and every time I have receive the best packaging That all

no proper option to contact if any fraud or lose of items , missing items report, no proper solution, we need to loos the money for the order what we haven't received the items. very worst service. not suggestable. please don't oder from blinking if items are missing they no support or solution ir provided from blinking.

I had placed the order 40 minutes ago and till now I don't know anything. I am calling my delivery partner by going to the manual option of the blanket but their blanket system is making the call automatically.

I placed an order today through Blinkit for an Ambrane data cable. The invoice and specifications are attached in this mail. As per the specifications, the cable should support data transfer. However, while it charges my mobile phone, it does not connect to my laptop for data transfer. Since the product is not functioning as described, I request to return this order and initiate the refund process. till now not refund

Absolutely pathetic service from Blinkit. I paid extra for gift wrapping, and the order was delivered without any wrapping. What’s worse is the customer support response — instead of taking responsibility, they simply refunded the amount as a promo code and refused to provide a proper solution. If customers are paying for a service, at least deliver it. This feels completely unprofessional and misleading. Ruined the purpose of the gift and wasted my time dealing with careless support.

It is a very bad application as I send the order but the location is taken by the default Sargasan location and I'm leaving in sector. As discussed again with blinkit customer care executive, GPS is disabled and again I recorded the things, still the same thing happened. Why devloper/blinkit is not updated the application properly. In the same area, my neighbour is ordered and blinkit delivered the things with the same location in the sector. Pls try to understand the concern of the customer.

its nice app, great in all terms except the part where riders have a cash limit . I often find difficulty if orders are placed at evening as riders have limited cash limit . maybe make it every 12 hours , it reset and they have to deposit collected cash at their main store or something

love the experience I love the quality also the drinks came chilled and there were no damaged items. which is actually a good thing. the delevery time is also max 10-15 mins only so best for emergencies or smth... lastly, I love blinkit and its services.
I have been using the app for quite some time. But recently my experience was very bad. Amount deducted but no refund, wrong items delivered, sometimes delivery taking too long etc.

l advanced paid for the big order and the items weren't delivered. The Bot offered a refund which would take 5 days? why the delay in refunding my money. This is a sham going on in the company. Can't be trusted anymore. Poor customer service. 😏

It is fine for people who cannot access stores themselves but they are scamming people by only keeping big quantity food, you HAVE to add 10 rupee items as well. or else I'll sue you all. and add "Swastik Mixture" it's very popular where i live and i need it on blinkit.

earlier it was a good service platform but now it is acting like some fraud platform. it'll make you pay for all selected items and later will cancel a few of them without your knowledge. it'll not be shown even in your order list. And forget about any refund

when you order, it's in stock and u ad 2-3 extra items more n when order is placed,after that main order is cancelled n extra items are delivered, happening for last 2 months,is it some marketing strategy to sell your extras,damn it blinkit.

so far so good, variety of options, sometimes in our city some items don't get stocked again like exotic vegetables which is sad but rest is good, also don't make it a 10 minute delivery app, it's cool even if we get our stuff in an hour, don't stress yourselves or your riders 😊

blinkit is good, it does make things easier and faster, but it charges so much like handling charge 12 rupees it was 5 yesterday. and surge charge or currently unavailable... this is so irritating when I want something it is always unavailable or unnecessary high surge charge...

Message I am extremely disappointed with the quality control and customer service. I ordered Nutri-Rich chicken from Blinkit, and when I opened the packet, it had a very foul and rotten smell. Even after washing it thoroughly and soaking it in vinegar, the smell remained. Upon checking the packaging, I discovered that the product had already expired two days ago. It is unacceptable that expired food products are being delivered to customers without proper checks. Disgusting.

Blinkit must take care of extra charges. From other app if we order they don't charge extra. But Blinkit whether you purchase for RS 300 or 5k items they charge extra for unnecessary reasons. I am a regular customer you must take care of those extra charges

i have purchased diapers 3 times and all the time it was torn or someone else 's return package. 1 start for good return policy otherwise they stock everything old. every thing i bought was filled with dust. I don't understand why u running the store like this if u can't deliver good stuff. worst app
